issues.description: A malformed later WAIVED (reason-less) did not null out an earlier verdict in the same round, so the round could still resolve to VERIFIED/ISSUES_FOUND — the opposite of the reviewer's final (waive) intent — instead of the soft-warn/no-verdict outcome.
issues.verificationMethod: Verifier (gpt-5-4) traced _parse_round_body's WAIVED branch in the round-1 fix delta: 'if not reason: continue' left the prior verdict variable standing.
issues.suggestedTestOrCheck: A round with an earlier valid verdict and a later malformed WAIVED (incl. the blank-line-separated Reason: case) must parse to verdict None.
issues.resolution_notes: The malformed-WAIVED branch now nulls verdict and waive_reason before continuing, so the reviewer's last (malformed) verdict attempt fails toward the louder no-verdict posture. Regression test test_later_malformed_waived_nulls_an_earlier_verdict.
